list.title: Sumba
list.description: Constructor

list.title: Sumba#adminMenu
list.description: Build admin menu based on locals and request

list.title: Sumba#applyActionHook
list.description: Apply action hook to the provided model.

list.title: Sumba#applyQueryHook
list.description: Apply query hook to the provided model.

list.title: Sumba#checkIconset
list.description: Check and set the iconset for a request.

list.title: Sumba#checkRoute
list.description: Check the route for a request.

list.title: Sumba#checkRouteGuard
list.description: Check route guard

list.title: Sumba#checkTeam
list.description: Check and set the team for a request.

list.title: Sumba#checkTheme
list.description: Check and set the theme for a request.

list.title: Sumba#checkUser
list.description: Check and set the user for a request.

list.title: Sumba#checkXSite
list.description: Check and set the Cross-site settings for a request.

list.title: Sumba#clearCacheSite
list.description: Clear the cache for a specific site.

list.title: Sumba#clearCacheUser
list.description: Clear the cache for a specific user.

list.title: Sumba#createJwtFromUserRecord
list.description: Create JWT from user record

list.title: Sumba#createNewSite
list.description: Create a new site with the specified alias and optional hostname, using fixtures for initial data.

list.title: Sumba#createRefs
list.description: Create references for the specified site using the provided data, options, and verbosity settings.

list.title: Sumba#filterModelFromSetting
list.description: Filter model data based on settings.

list.title: Sumba#generatePassword
list.description: Generate a random password based on the configuration settings

list.title: Sumba#getActionGuards
list.description: Get action guards, optionally reloading them from the database.

list.title: Sumba#getAllFixtures
list.description: Get all fixtures for the specified alias, replacing any occurrences of '{alias}' in the fixture data with the provided alias.

list.title: Sumba#getAnonymousGuards
list.description: Get anonymous guards, optionally reloading them from the database.

list.title: Sumba#getApiKeyFromUserId
list.description: Get API key from user ID by hashing the user's salt

list.title: Sumba#getAttribGuards
list.description: Get attribute guards, optionally reloading them from the database.

list.title: Sumba#getCountriesValues
list.description: Get a list of countries with their values and names

list.title: Sumba#getModelNames
list.description: Get all loaded model names, optionally returning them as value-text pairs.

list.title: Sumba#getQueryGuards
list.description: Get query guards, optionally reloading them from the database.

list.title: Sumba#getSecureGuards
list.description: Get secure guards, optionally reloading them from the database.

list.title: Sumba#getSite
list.description: Get site information based on the provided input, which can be either a hostname or an ID. If multi-site is enabled, it will fetch the site based on the hostname or ID; otherwise, it will return the default site.

list.title: Sumba#getTeamIdsAndAliases
list.description: Get the team IDs and aliases for the user in the request.

list.title: Sumba#getUserById
list.description: Get a user by their ID.

list.title: Sumba#getUserByToken
list.description: Get a user by their token.

list.title: Sumba#hash
list.description: Hash the given item using the specified algorithm from the configuration.

list.title: Sumba#init
list.description: Plugin initialization method. This method is called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin initialization.

list.title: Sumba#mergeTeam
list.description: Merge team information into the user object.

list.title: Sumba#parseNsSettings
list.description: Parse namespace settings for a request.

list.title: Sumba#passwordRule
list.description: Generate a password validation rule based on the configuration settings.

list.title: Sumba#pathsToCheck
list.description: Gather all paths to check for a request.

list.title: Sumba#populateRouteGuards
list.description: Populate route guards at start

list.title: Sumba#rebuildFilter
list.description: Rebuild the filter for the provided model.

list.title: Sumba#removeRefs
list.description: Remove references for the specified site using the provided options and verbosity settings.

list.title: Sumba#removeSite
list.description: Remove a site with the specified alias, along with its references, using the provided verbosity settings.

list.title: Sumba#resetToken
list.description: Reset token by generating a new salt and hashing it twice to create a new token.

list.title: Sumba#runAttribGuard
list.description: Apply attribute guards to the provided model.

list.title: Sumba#runQueryGuard
list.description: Apply query guards to the provided query.

list.title: Sumba#sendMail
list.description:
Method to send mail through Masohi Messaging System. It is a thin wrapper for {@link https://github.com/ardhi/masohi-mail|masohi-mail} send method.

If both masohiMail and waibu are not loaded, nothing is delivered.

list.title: Sumba#signin
list.description: Sign in user and redirect to the specified URL

list.title: Sumba#signout
list.description: Sign out user and redirect to the specified URL

list.title: Sumba#start
list.description: Plugin start method. This method is called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin start.

list.title: Sumba#verifyApiKey
list.description: Verify API key

list.title: Sumba#verifyBasic
list.description: Verify basic authentication

list.title: Sumba#verifyJwt
list.description: Verify JWT authentication

list.title: Sumba#verifySession
list.description: Verify user session

list.title: TConfig
list.description: Sumba configuration object

list.title: factory
list.description:
Plugin factory.

Never call this function directly!!! It's only-meant to be called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin initialization.
